calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To May-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Paltenghi for and with Blaire Morse.

Mr. Paltenghi reported that his client's marriage began in 2008, that funds from the Amertrade account came from wage earnings in the form of a bonus that was partially distributed in December 2009 and in February 2010. The Court instructed Counsel to file a further declaration to explain the origin of the funds. Mr. Paltenghi stated that they are dropping the request for the partnership interest. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Account and report information, etc. was continued to May 28, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
